scenarios.scenario_name: [bevy-replication-01] enable_replication scopes entity into client Bevy world

steps.step_text: a server entity is spawned in-scope for the client with Position
the entity spawns on the client

scenarios.scenario_name: [bevy-replication-02] SpawnEntityEvent fires on entity scope entry

steps.step_text: a server entity is spawned in-scope for the client with Position

scenarios.scenario_name: [bevy-replication-03] disable_replication removes entity from client Bevy world

steps.step_text: a server entity is spawned in-scope for the client with Position
the server disables replication for the entity
the entity is absent from the client world

scenarios.scenario_name: [bevy-replication-04] DespawnEntityEvent fires when entity leaves scope

steps.step_text: a server entity is spawned in-scope for the client with Position
the server disables replication for the entity

scenarios.scenario_name: [bevy-replication-05] Bevy world mutation replicates via ECS change detection

steps.step_text: a server entity is spawned in-scope for the client with Position at the origin
the server mutates Position to 42 and 42

scenarios.scenario_name: [bevy-authority-01] give_authority grants EntityAuthStatus::Granted

steps.step_text: a server entity is spawned in-scope for the client with Position
the entity is configured as Delegated
the server grants authority to the client
the client has authority status Granted

scenarios.scenario_name: [bevy-authority-02] EntityAuthGrantedEvent fires on authority grant

steps.step_text: a server entity is spawned in-scope for the client with Position
the entity is configured as Delegated
the server grants authority to the client

scenarios.scenario_name: [bevy-authority-03] request_authority results in EntityAuthStatus::Granted

steps.step_text: a server entity is spawned in-scope for the client with Position
the entity is configured as Delegated
the client requests authority for the entity
the client has authority status Granted

scenarios.scenario_name: [bevy-authority-04] Second requester sees EntityAuthDeniedEvent

steps.step_text: a server entity is spawned in-scope for both clients with Position
the entity is configured as Delegated
the first client requests authority for the entity
the second client requests authority for the entity
the second client has observed EntityAuthDeniedEvent

scenarios.scenario_name: [bevy-resource-01] replicate_resource inserts Bevy Resource on client with correct value

steps.step_text: the server inserts TestScore home 3 away 1 as a replicated resource
the client has TestScore as a Bevy resource

scenarios.scenario_name: [bevy-resource-02] ResMut mutation propagates to client Bevy Resource

steps.step_text: the server inserts TestScore home 0 away 0 as a replicated resource
the server mutates TestScore to home 7 away 2

scenarios.scenario_name: [bevy-resource-03] request_resource_authority is observed as Denied by server

steps.step_text: the server inserts TestPlayerSelection as a delegable resource
the client requests authority for TestPlayerSelection
the server observes Denied authority for TestPlayerSelection

scenarios.scenario_name: Server starts and accepts a connecting client
Server can disconnect a client
Multiple clients can connect to server
Server tracks client count accurately
Connecting client is in connected state
Disconnecting client is no longer connected
Server and client observe connect events
Server and client observe disconnect events
Event ordering is correct on disconnect

steps.step_text: the server observed ConnectEvent before DisconnectEvent
the client observed ConnectEvent before DisconnectEvent
